specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive's supply-chain compliance data is automatically captured through digital traceability systems (ERP/supplier portal) as of Q1 2026?
answer: As of Q1 2026,  72% of Elexion Automotive's supply-chain compliance data is automatically captured through digital traceability systems.
justification: The automation share shows how much of the documentation pipeline is already machine-readable; this determines the remaining integration effort (APIs, supplier onboarding) needed for audit-grade, unified reporting.
dr_question: How should Elexion Automotive update its compliance documentation framework by 2026 to verify and record supply-chain investment credits under Canada’s revised ZEV mandate?
